candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; ideal top-line revenue label.

Recurring lease-related interest cost; include as financing cost.

candidates.why: Duplicate supplemental disclosure of lease interest already captured by Lease Interest Cost.
Profit subtotal, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest on deposits in financial institutions etc
candidates.why: Interest income, not expense.
Balance sheet liability, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest-cost rows and excluded total Financial costs and broad/possibly mixed Other Financial Expense to avoid double counting and non-interest items.
